query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.address, e.neighborhood, e.instagram, e.image, e.phone, e.hours, c.name as category
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Boteco Moderno%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN e.neighborhood IN ('Vila Madalena', 'Pinheiros') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, e.neighborhood, e.name;

WHERE c.name LIKE '%Boteco Moderno%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN e.neighborhood IN ('Vila Madalena', 'Pinheiros') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, e.neighborhood, e.name;
